articles.title: RIL charts multi-year plan to offset decline in natural gas output
articles.description: Reliance Industries plans a multi-year campaign to boost natural gas output. This effort aims to offset declining production from existing fields. Elevated gas prices are expected due to ongoing West Asia conflict. The company anticipates better price realization for its KG-D6 gas fields. Continued investment in coal-bed methane operations will also proceed.

articles.title: Sixth day of US, Iran counterattacks puts ceasefire out of reach
articles.description: The U.S. and Iran traded attacks again on Friday, pressuring oil prices and making a quick return to the fragile ceasefire deal signed last month even less likely. Nearly a week of back-and-forth strikes by both sides has expanded beyond strictly military targets to include bridges, utilities and port facilities. articles.title: High gas prices and airfare are changing summer travel plans for millions of Americans
articles.description: A new LendingTree survey finds 75% of Americans say gas prices and airfare have changed their summer travel plans. Here's how experts say you can keep costs down.
